name: bank_hash
description: A bank hash computed at the end of a slot's execution

bank_hash.description: Bank hash of this slot (32 bytes)

prev_bank_hash.description: Bank hash of the parent slot (32 bytes)

accounts_lt_hash_checksum.description: Accounts lt-hash checksum, blake3 of the accounts lthash (32 bytes)

poh_hash.description: Proof-of-history hash at the end of the slot (32 bytes)

slot.description: Slot this bank hash is for

signature_cnt.description: Total number of signatures processed in the slot
